files.patch:
@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@
-# Copyright (c) 2015, 2025, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
+# Copyright (c) 2015, 2026, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
@@ -152,0 +152,36 @@
+security-properties.argument=props=<filename>:include=<filename>
+
+security-properties.description=\
+The props option overrides the security properties in the\n\
+conf/security/java.security configuration file with the properties in the\n\
+specified filename. Security properties with the same name are overridden\n\
+and security properties not present are added to the end of the\n\
+conf/security/java.security configuration file.\n\
+The include option adds an include statement with the specified filename to\n\
+the end of the conf/security/java.security configuration file. The filename\n\
+does not need to exist at jlink time.\n\
+Each option can be specified at most once. If both options are specified,\n\
+the include statement is always added as the last line of the\n\
+conf/security/java.security configuration file, after any new security\n\
+properties that may have been added.
+
+security-properties.usage=\
+\  --security-properties props=<filename>:include=<filename>\n\
+\                            The props option overrides the security properties\n\
+\                            in the conf/security/java.security configuration\n\
+\                            file with the properties in the specified\n\
+\                            filename. Security properties with the same name\n\
+\                            are overridden and security properties not\n\
+\                            present are added to the end of the\n\
+\                            conf/security/java.security configuration file.\n\
+\                            The include option adds an include statement\n\
+\                            with the specified filename to the end of the\n\
+\                            conf/security/java.security configuration file.\n\
+\                            The filename does not need to exist at jlink time.\n\
+\                            Each option can be specified at most once. If\n\
+\                            both options are specified, the include statement\n\
+\                            is always added as the last line of the\n\
+\                            conf/security/java.security configuration file,\n\
+\                            after any new security properties that may have\n\
+\                            been added.
+

@@ -2,1 +2,1 @@

@@ -84,1 +84,2 @@
-        jdk.tools.jlink.internal.plugins.SaveJlinkArgfilesPlugin;
+        jdk.tools.jlink.internal.plugins.SaveJlinkArgfilesPlugin,
+        jdk.tools.jlink.internal.plugins.SecurityPropertiesPlugin;

@@ -238,0 +238,21 @@
+### Plugin `security-properties`
+
+Options
+:   `--security-properties=props=`*filename*`:include=`*filename*
+
+Description
+:   The `props` option overrides the security properties in the
+    `conf/security/java.security` configuration file with the properties in
+    the specified *filename*. Security properties with the same name are
+    overridden and security properties not present are added to the end of the
+    `conf/security/java.security` configuration file.
+
+    The `include` option adds an `include` statement with the specified
+    *filename* to the end of the `conf/security/java.security` configuration
+    file. The filename does not need to exist at `jlink` time.
+
+    Each option can be specified at most once. If both options are specified,
+    the `include` statement is always added as the last line of the
+    `conf/security/java.security` configuration file, after any
+    new security properties that may have been added.
+
